title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on how AGI economics will reshape capital vs. labor shares, tax policy, wealth redistribution, and global inequality. They discuss whether demand collapse is likely, integration of humans into machine economies, and strategies for developing countries to benefit from AI gains.
